description: Search cm entries by content across scopes. Returns FTS5 BM25-ranked hits. Use cx_search when you have a query and want results from multiple scopes, an unknown scope, or all scopes. Use cx_recall when you want priority-ordered context for a single known scope, walking ancestors. Recall is sharper but narrower.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous cx_search response. Pass next_cursor to fetch the next page.

kinds.description: Filter to specific entry kinds (OR logic). Valid values: fact, decision, preference, lesson, reference, feedback, pattern, observation.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return. Default: 20, max: 200.

query.description: Required FTS5 search query. Use 1-3 keywords. Supports prefix queries (rust*), phrase queries ("scope path"), and boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT).

scope.description: Scope filter for content search. Send a JSON object {kind, ...} where kind is one of: 'path' (with 'path'), 'subtree' (with 'path', matches scope and descendants), 'set' (with 'paths'), 'all' (no extras), 'cwd_inferred' (optional 'cwd'), 'project'/'repo'/'session' (with matching identifier fields). See the schema's examples field for canonical shapes.

cwd.description: Filesystem path used for scope inference. Optional for kind 'cwd_inferred'.

path.description: Canonical scope path beginning with 'global'. Required for kind 'path'; required for kind 'subtree' on broad shapes.

paths.description: List of canonical scope paths. Required for kind 'set'.

project.description: Project identifier. Required for kind 'project', 'repo', and 'session'.

repo.description: Repo identifier. Required for kind 'repo'. Optional for kind 'session'.

tags.description: Filter to entries with any of these tags (OR logic). Pass a JSON array: ["tag1", "tag2"].

name: cx_search

outputSchema.description: Search response: content-ranked rows and cursor pagination metadata.

entries.description: FTS5-ranked search rows. Order is significant.

snippet.description: Smart snippet of the entry body, with matched query terms bracketed.

kinds_histogram.description: Per-kind counts for this page, as ordered `{bucket, count}` objects sorted by count descending.

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page. Omitted when there are no more rows.

query.description: FTS5 query supplied by the caller.

returned.description: Number of rows in this page.

scope_hits.description: Per-scope hit counts for this page, as ordered `{bucket, count}` objects sorted by count descending.

tags_histogram.description: Per-tag counts for this page, as ordered `{bucket, count}` objects sorted by count descending.

tokens.description: Estimated token total of the full bodies in this page.
